title: Station 5
subtitle: Water Towers: New Perspectives
text: Station 5 is a finalist submission to the competition 'Water Towers: New Perspectives,' organized by the Bezalel Academy of Art and Design, Berkeley University, and the Society for Preservation of Israel Heritage Sites (SPIHS) in 2010. The design was proposed for the city's first water tower, built in the 1920s and situated in the town square next to municipal buildings and primary urban institutions.
